headline: 3 Resilient Defense Stocks to Buy in July
summary: Defense stocks are the rare corner of the market where geopolitical anxiety, fiscal generosity and multi-year revenue visibility all converge at once. With the Fiscal Year 2027 investment request by the Department of War totaling $756.8 billion, and President Trump declaring that “our Military Budget for the year 2027 should not be $1 Trillion Dollars, ... 3 Resilient Defense Stocks to Buy in July
